series.description: PADD imports are recorded by district of entry, not final destination or consumption region. Only mutually exclusive PADD rows may be combined with complete same-week coverage; use the source-published U.S. total for the national view.
series.title: Commercial crude oil imports

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish this weekly commercial crude-import series by city.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish this weekly commercial crude-import series by county.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: PADD crude imports represent district of entry and must not be allocated to states or destinations.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This exact commercial crude-import series is published by PADD and for the United States, not by PADD subdistrict.

series.description: Commercial crude stocks exclude the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Cushing is a source-published local storage-hub observation nested under PADD 2, not a state total. Only mutually exclusive PADD rows may be combined; never add Cushing to PADD 2 because it is already contained within that district.
series.title: Commercial crude oil stocks excluding SPR

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: Cushing is the only activated official local crude-stock node; county detail is not published by this series.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: The Cushing observation is a source-defined local storage hub, not permission to infer Oklahoma or other state stocks.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This exact commercial crude-stock series is published for Cushing, PADDs, and the United States, not PADD subdistricts.

series.description: Days of supply is a source-published coverage ratio, not an additive inventory quantity and not a forecast of the date inventories will be exhausted. The crude measure excludes SPR stocks and must not be summed or averaged across regions.
series.title: Crude oil days of supply excluding SPR

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: This days-of-supply ratio is published at the U.S. level only.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: This days-of-supply ratio is not published by state or producing area.

unsupported_levels.reason: This days-of-supply ratio is not published by PADD subdistrict.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD
unsupported_levels.reason: This days-of-supply ratio is not published by PADD.

series.description: Exports are weekly average outbound flows and can be volatile because individual cargoes are large. This source series is U.S.-only and must not be allocated to PADDs, ports, states, or cities.
series.title: Crude oil exports

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly crude-export series is published at the U.S. level only.

unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly crude-export series is not published by state or producing area.

unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly crude-export series is not published by PADD subdistrict.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly crude-export series is not published by PADD.

series.description: Net imports equal imports less exports and can be negative when exports exceed imports. Do not add net imports to gross imports or exports; the net series already combines both directions.

unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly crude net-import series is not published by PADD.

series.description: This EIA monthly field-production concept includes lease condensate. Special producing areas can overlap broader state or PADD rows; prefer official PADD and U.S. totals rather than summing every displayed area.

series.description: EIA publishes exact weekly rows for Alaska, the Lower 48 States, and the United States; the separate monthly series remains the source for broader state and producing-area detail. series.description: Crude inputs are refinery throughput, not crude production, operable capacity, or utilization. Only mutually exclusive PADD observations may be combined; complete same-week coverage is required and the source-published U.S. value remains preferred.

series.description: SPR barrels are government emergency reserves and are distinct from commercial crude inventories. Do not add this component to a total-crude-stocks-including-SPR series; it is already included there.

series.description: Imports are weekly average inbound flows for EIA's residual-fuel-oil category. Imports are published by PADD district of entry and for the United States; only complete, mutually exclusive PADD rows may be combined.
series.title: Residual fuel oil imports

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil import series is not published by city.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil import series is not published by county.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil import series is not published by state.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil import series is not published by PADD subdistrict.

series.description: Product supplied is an implied-demand balance measure, not a direct meter reading of end-user consumption. Weekly values can reflect trade timing, stock movements, and balancing adjustments as well as end-use demand.
series.title: Residual fuel oil product supplied (implied demand)

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil implied-demand series is published at the U.S. level only.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil implied-demand series is not published by county.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil implied-demand series is not published by state.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil implied-demand series is not published by PADD subdistrict.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil implied-demand series is not published by PADD.

series.description: This is a weekly average production rate for EIA's residual-fuel-oil category. EIA publishes source rows for each PADD and the United States; only complete, mutually exclusive PADD rows may be combined. It is not refinery capacity and must not be added to stocks without converting rates to compatible period volumes.
series.title: Residual fuel oil production

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil production series is not published by city.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil production series is not published by county.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil production series is not published by state.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil production series is not published by PADD subdistrict.

series.description: This is an end-of-week inventory level for EIA's residual-fuel-oil category, not a flow or storage-capacity measure. EIA publishes source rows for each PADD and the United States; only complete, mutually exclusive PADD rows may be combined.
series.title: Residual fuel oil stocks

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil stock series is not published by city.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil stock series is not published by county.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil stock series is not published by state.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This weekly residual-fuel-oil stock series is not published by PADD subdistrict.

series.description: Never average child percentages; aggregate compatible inputs and capacity first. Published utilization can legitimately exceed 100 percent and must not be capped.
series.title: Refinery utilization

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: Weekly refinery utilization is not published for cities or individual refineries.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: Weekly refinery utilization is not published at county level.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: Do not allocate PADD utilization to states.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: The selected utilization measure is published at PADD and U.S. levels only.
